mapper.select: SELECT id, openid, phone, nickname, avatar_url, status, ban_reason, ban_remark, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, openid, phone, nickname, avatar_url, status, ban_reason, ban_remark, create_time, update_time FROM user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user(openid, phone, nickname, avatar_url, status) VALUES(#{openid}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET status = #{status}, ban_reason = #{banReason}, ban_remark = #{banRemark}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
